title: Add reconstructable artifact storage policy
goal: Codify checked-in structured artifact storage classes so new machine-readable files must declare whether they are durable source, generated adapter, local/cache, derived evidence, audit distillation, duplicate, or routed gap.
Extend the structured-file inventory checker with storage-policy validation and guardrails that route known reconstructable residue to #536, #537, #538, #539, and #540.
non_goals: Do not delete or relocate existing evidence snapshots, generated mirrors, or audit artifacts in this slice.
Do not add a new top-level command.
Do not make host-specific tracker assumptions part of the shipped package contract.

intent.outcome: new tracked structured artifacts cannot silently become unchecked persistence surfaces; reconstructable residue is classified and routed
intent.constraints: implementation-independent package policy, compact checker, source refs over copied facts
intent.latitude: may extend the existing inventory schema/checker/tests and planning state
intent.escalation: stop if enforcing the policy requires deleting artifacts or changing external adapter behavior

execution.next_step: archive this slice and promote #536 for concrete artifact compression
execution.proof: uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py -q (9 passed); uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success (passed); uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py (passed); uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q (206 passed); uv run ruff check src tests (passed); uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json (healthy)

invariants: inventory remains the checked map for structured files
concrete cleanup work stays in child issues #536-#540
generated/local/reconstructable classes must carry regeneration or recovery guidance

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: no edits by subagents, no host-specific package assumptions

immediate_next_action: Update inventory schema with storage_class, reconstructability, justification, and guardrail fields.
invariants: The inventory remains compact enough to act as a guardrail, not a dashboard.
Concrete cleanup children stay open until implemented.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Every structured-file inventory entry declares a storage class.
Generated, reconstructable, duplicate, cache, and local-only classes must say how to regenerate, reconstruct, remove, or why they are kept.
open_questions_to_close: Which storage classes are enough for current artifact residue without overfitting?
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Inventory schema requires storage classification fields.
Checker enforces storage-policy requirements beyond raw schema shape.
Tests cover invalid generated/reconstructable/duplicate guardrails and routed cleanup children.
#541 is closed and child cleanup issues remain routed in state.
